messages.content: 非常感谢您对我们的支持。目前，我们没有这样的功能。再次感谢您选择我们。用英语来优化这段话
Thank you very much for your support. Currently, we do not have such a feature. Once again, we appreciate your choice to use our services.
Thank you very much for your support. Currently, we do not have such a feature. Once again, we appreciate your choice to use our services.润色

Thank you so much for your support. Unfortunately, we do not currently offer that functionality. Nonetheless, we truly value your decision to choose our services, and we are grateful for your continued support.
尊敬的顾客，非常抱歉给您带来许多的不便。我向物流部门了解了最新的情况，您的快递被退回。请您放心，我们这边会给您重新补发，并要求物流部门加急处理。请您放心，我会跟进您的包裹。  帮我用英语来翻译并修饰

Dear valued customer, we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. I have reached out to our logistics department for the latest update and it appears that your package has been returned. Rest assured, we will arrange for a re-delivery and request urgent handling from the logistics department. Please be assured that I will personally follow up on your package.

Dear valued customer, we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. I have reached out to our logistics department for the latest update and it appears that your package has been returned. Rest assured, we will arrange for a re-delivery and request urgent handling from the logistics department. Please be assured that I will personally follow up on your package. 润色一下

Dear valued customer, we deeply apologize for the inconvenience this may have caused you. I have personally investigated the matter with our logistics department and it seems that your package has been returned. Please rest assured that we are taking immediate action, arranging for a re-delivery, and requesting expedited handling from the logistics department. I want to assure you that I will personally oversee the progress and keep you updated on your package.
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成困扰。我们通过后台日志查询到，可能是由于您网络的问题。请您尝试用其他手机设备并连接其他网络尝试。如果仍然有问题，请您告诉我们您的详细情况，如果有一段视频能更好的帮助我们定位问题。非常感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。    将上面这段话的意思给英国客户写邮件

Dear valued customer,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced. After reviewing the backend logs, it appears that the issue may be related to your network. We kindly request you to try accessing our services using a different mobile device and connecting to an alternative network. If the problem persists, please provide us with detailed information, and if possible, a video clip depicting the issue will greatly assist us in identifying the problem. 

We truly appreciate your cooperation in this matter and wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成的困扰。由于现在，我们无法直接发货或补发至希腊。但是您的满意是我们最大的追求，您看，我们给您退款50美金以此来解决这个问题。您如果接受的话，请您提供paypal账号。感谢您的谅解。祝您生活愉快       将上面这段话的意思给英国客户写邮件

Dear valued customer,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. At the moment, we are unable to offer direct shipping or re-delivery services to Greece. However, your satisfaction is our top priority, and as a solution, we would like to offer you a $50 refund. If you are willing to accept this offer, please provide us with your PayPal account details. Thank you for your understanding.

We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，我们在HHOLOVE APP后台收到您的反馈。对于您的问题，请您确认是否将食盆打开。食盆需要您手动打开并且在使用的过程中需要一直打开。如果您有任何问题，请随时与我们联系。如果有一段详细的视频，将有助于我们定位您的问题解决问题。祝您生活愉快！  用上面的话给台湾用户写邮件

尊敬的用户，

感谢您在HHOLOVE APP后台提供的反馈。针对您的问题，请确认是否已经将食盆打开。食盆需要您手动打开，并且在使用过程中需要一直保持打开状态。如果您有任何疑问，请随时与我们联系。如果您能提供一段详细的视频，将有助于我们更好地定位并解决您的问题。

祝您生活愉快！

敬上，
尊敬的用户，我们收到您在klarna的争议反馈。请您先取消在klarna上的争议，我将为您解决您所遇到的售后问题。我了解到您需要进行退款退货的请求，请您告诉我您因为什么原因需要退款退货呢，这样我可以更好的帮您解决。如果有任何问题请您随时与我们联系，祝您生活愉快。     按照上面的意思给英国用户写一份邮件

Dear valued customer,

We have received your dispute feedback regarding Klarna. Before we proceed, we kindly request you to cancel the dispute on Klarna. Rest assured, we are here to assist you with your after-sales issue. We understand that you are requesting a refund and return, but could you please provide more details on the reason for this request? This will enable us to better understand and resolve your issue.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成不便。我们收到来自物流人员的反馈，您的地址无法配送。请您提供准确可收货的地址（国家，洲，市，已经详细地址），联系电话以及联系人姓名。感谢您对我们的支持，祝您生活愉快       用上面的话给英国用户写一封邮件

Dear valued customer,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. We have received feedback from our logistics team stating that your address is undeliverable. To ensure a successful delivery, could you please provide us with an accurate and valid shipping address (country, state/region, city, and detailed address), along with a contact phone number and the recipient's name? 

Thank you for your continuous support. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,

Dear valued customer,

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. We have received feedback from our logistics team stating that your address is undeliverable. To ensure a successful delivery, could you please provide us with an accurate and valid shipping address (country, state/region, city, and detailed address), along with a contact phone number and the recipient’s name?

Thank you for your continuous support. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,     请润色

Dear valued customer,

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. It has come to our attention that our logistics team encountered difficulties in delivering to the provided address. To ensure a successful and prompt delivery, we kindly request you to provide us with an accurate and valid shipping address including the country, state/region, city, and a detailed address. Additionally, please provide us with a contact phone number and the recipient's name for smoother communication and coordination.

We highly appreciate your ongoing support and understanding. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We wish you a delightful day ahead.

Best regards,

尊敬的用户，
我们收到了您的反馈，很抱歉给您造成不便。请您先按照如下的步骤进行操作：1.拔出适配器给设备断电5秒，然后再插入给设备供电，看表情灯是都有亮起，如果没有亮起则双击一下按键是否喂食马达会转动？如果有则适配器供电没有问题；
2.设备启动至少90秒钟后，查看这段时间设备是否有自动重启，如果有则拍一段90秒视频给我们确认；如果没有则进入下一步；
3.长按Feed按键7~10秒，让设备恢复出厂设置，等设备重启完成发出待联网的提示音，再打开APP搜索设备进行绑定。

以上步骤可以重复几次，如果还是不成功，且设备启动过程没有声音提示，设备启动过程出现反复重启，长按Feed按键没有反应等，可以拍摄一段视频给我们，我们确认后会安排进行售后处理。另外也请您提供SN码（您可以在设备底部的标签上查找到）和您的订单信息。如果您有任何问题，请随时与我们联系。

再次向您表示歉意，祝您生活愉快                    用上面这段话的意思给英国用户写邮件

Dear valued customer,

We have received your feedback, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. Please follow the steps below to troubleshoot the issue:

1. Disconnect the adapter from the device and wait for 5 seconds before reconnecting it. Check if the LED indicator lights up after reconnecting. If not, try double-clicking the button to see if the feeding motor rotates. If it does, then the adapter is functioning properly.

2. After the device has been running for at least 90 seconds, check if it automatically restarts during this period. If it does, please record a 90-second video for us to confirm. If not, proceed to the next step.

3. Press and hold the Feed button for 7 to 10 seconds to perform a factory reset. Wait for the device to complete the restart and issue the pairing prompt sound. Then, open the app and search for the device to begin the binding process.

Please repeat these steps a few times. If the issue persists and there are no sound prompts during the device's startup, repeated restarts during the startup process, or no response to the long press of the Feed button, please provide us with a video for further assistance. Additionally, kindly provide the SN code (located on the label at the bottom of the device) and your order information. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,

Dear valued customer,

 

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. It has come to our attention that our logistics team encountered difficulties in delivering to the provided address. To ensure a successful and prompt delivery, we kindly request you to provide us with an accurate and valid shipping address including the country, state/region, city, and a detailed address. Additionally, please provide us with a contact phone number and the recipient’s name for smoother communication and coordination.

 

We highly appreciate your ongoing support and understanding. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We wish you a delightful day ahead.

 

Best regards,     用这段话的意思写给中国客户邮件

尊敬的用户，

非常抱歉给您带来的不便。我们收到了您在HHOLOVE APP后台提供的反馈。针对您的问题，请您确认是否已经将食盆打开。食盆需要您手动打开，并且在使用过程中需要一直保持打开状态。如果您有任何疑问，请随时与我们联系。如果您能提供一段详细的视频，将有助于我们更好地定位并解决您的问题。

祝您生活愉快！

敬上，

Dear valued customer,

 

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. It has come to our attention that our logistics team encountered difficulties in delivering to the provided address. To ensure a successful and prompt delivery, we kindly request you to provide us with an accurate and valid shipping address including the country, state/region, city, and a detailed address. Additionally, please provide us with a contact phone number and the recipient’s name for smoother communication and coordination.

 

We highly appreciate your ongoing support and understanding. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us. We wish you a delightful day ahead.

 

Best regards                      翻译成中文

尊敬的用户，

非常抱歉给您带来的不便。我们注意到我们的物流团队在配送至您提供的地址时遇到了困难。为了确保成功且及时地进行配送，请您提供准确而有效的配送地址，包括国家、省/州、城市以及详细地址。另外，请提供一个可联系到您的电话号码和收件人姓名，以便更加顺畅地沟通和协调。

非常感谢您一直以来的支持和理解。如果您有任何进一步的问题或疑虑，请随时与我们联系。祝您度过愉快的一天。

最好的祝福，
尊敬的用户，请您提供完整的视频以及设备id，也请您告诉我们您的购买渠道以及订单号，这样可以方便我们后续的售后服务。    用这样的意思给英国用户写一封邮件

Dear valued customer,

We kindly request you to provide us with a complete video along with the device ID. Additionally, please inform us of your purchase channel and order number. This will facilitate our subsequent after-sales service for you.

Thank you for your cooperation and support. Should you have any further questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us.

Best regards,
尊敬的用户，感谢您对我们产品的关注。抱歉的是，我们的产品O-Sitter目前无法邮寄到您所在的国家土耳其。再次感谢您的支持与关注，祝您生活愉快。 用这段话的意思用英语发邮件

Dear valued customer,

Thank you for your interest in our product. Unfortunately, we regret to inform you that our O-Sitter product is currently unavailable for shipping to your country, Turkey. We apologize for any inconvenience caused. 

Once again, we appreciate your support and interest. We wish you a pleasant day.

Best regards,

app界面截图确认下  
1，延迟铲屎时间多少？
2，是否开启勿扰模式  翻译成英语

Please provide a screenshot of the app interface for confirmation.
1. How long is the delay for scooping?
2. Is the "Do Not Disturb" mode enabled?
尊敬的用户，非常抱歉给您造成麻烦。请您告诉我，O-Sitter的表情是否变化，请您可以录制稍微短一些的视频。另外请您告诉我 您的购买渠道已经订单信息。这些信息对后续进行服务非常重要。      用以上的信息写一封英语邮件

Dear valued customer,

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. Could you please confirm if the expression of the O-Sitter changes? It would be helpful if you can provide us with a shorter video recording. Additionally, please inform us about your purchase channel and order information. These details are essential for us to further assist you with our service.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We look forward to resolving this matter for you.

Best regards,
尊敬的顾客。非常抱歉给您造成困扰。我查询到，您是在11月21日下的订单，目前该订单正在备货准备发货中。我已经催促我们的同事尽快给您发货。后续的物流号我会发给您。给您造成的不便，我深表抱歉。祝您生活愉快                用上面的话的意思用英语发一封邮件

Dear valued customer,

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. Upon checking, I have found that your order was placed on November 21st
